name: First America Resources Corp
business: The Company operates in the IT asset disposition (ITAD) and electronics recycling industry, providing refurbishment and resale of IT equipment, secure data destruction, electronics recycling, data center decommissioning, and lifecycle management of technology assets. Customers include technology companies, telecommunications providers, defense contractors, educational institutions, government agencies, and Fortune 500 enterprises.

exposures.sentence: The Company provides services related to the retirement and replacement of computing infrastructure associated with artificial intelligence and high-performance computing environments.

Data Center Decommissioning We assist customers with data center infrastructure upgrades and decommissioning projects, including removal, transportation, and secure processing of servers and networking equipment.
The Company also processes certain emerging technology equipment including solar panels, electric vehicle batteries, and high-performance computing systems.
The Company also processes certain emerging technology equipment including solar panels, electric vehicle batteries, and high-performance computing systems.
The Company serves a diverse customer base across several sectors including technology companies, telecommunications providers, defense contractors, educational institutions, and government agencies.

Products handled by the Company include laptops, desktop computers, servers, networking equipment, SAN and NAS storage systems, telecommunications equipment, monitors, storage devices, processors, memory, and other IT components used in enterprise and industrial applications.
